title: Alex Younger, Former Head of Britain’s MI6, Dies at 62
summary_full: As director of the espionage agency from 2014 to 2020, he confronted a range of threats, including international terrorism and an emboldened Russia.
summary_public: As director of the espionage agency from 2014 to 2020, he confronted a range of threats, including international terrorism and an emboldened Russia.
